textByHashes.2a2c5134fe250d4c74e31d25dd4eabae6efda483: Oh man, oh, you did not just say that!
textByHashes.41a99871d414f804e7b9a62900050d1b31df9d80: The second I get up that tree I am going to pelt you with bitternuts until you are neck deep in them!
textByHashes.f21040da32fb704e80ac0bb54f834a1c8b31a8a1: Hmmmm...well, you seem sincere, how about you hurry up and use me on the tree and we'll call it even.
textByHashes.2d7c2dc0ceb563236b29da06921c8ef4d5f89d52: Sure. If I see any monkeys around the top of the tree I'll be careful and try and get you the nut whatever happens.
textByHashes.7282dac22a11d3ee3840b172e36d6dbbf70118f6: What? Can I come out of this bag now?
textByHashes.e0d1d6a0a12be168304258beb47d8d78ad3a5df4: Sigh...yes. Just take me to the tree and I'll grab one for you.
textByHashes.80db143b06556e92ad53c9ba55ab0641921c325f: Well if you are sure. Ok, I'll get up there and pass you the nut then.
